zh.Combe, West Oxfordshire District, Oxford: 英國英格蘭奧可福爾可姆
zh.Burial Details Unknown: 澳洲維斯特 奧斯特拉利亞未知 易曼德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Hurst於1505年出生在英國貝德福爾亨洛福時，他的父親Sir Edward Hurst25歲，母親Alice Francis Chamberlin20歲。他於1524年與Lady Regent Agnes de Dalton of Henlow Charlemagne descendant.在英國英格蘭貝德福爾亨洛福結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1569年5月30日之後在他的家鄉，埋葬在澳洲維斯特 奧斯特拉利亞未知 易曼德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Hurst于1505年出生在英国貝德福爾亨洛福时，他的父亲Sir Edward Hurst25岁，母亲Alice Francis Chamberlin20岁。他于1524年与Lady Regent Agnes de Dalton of Henlow Charlemagne descendant.在英国英格兰貝德福爾亨洛福结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1569年5月30日之后在他的家乡，埋葬在澳大利亚維斯特 奧斯特拉利亞未知 易曼德。

nameMeanings.name: Hurst
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): topographic name for someone who lived near a wood or wooded hill, from Middle English hirst(e), herst(e), hurst(e) (Old English hyrst) or a habitational name from any of the places so called, such as Hurst Green (in Mitton, Lancashire), Hirst (Northumberland), Hurst (Berkshire, Kent, Warwickshire), Hurstpierpoint (Sussex), or Hirst in Longwood (Yorkshire).
Irish: re-Anglicized form of de Horsaigh, the Gaelicized form of the English habitational name Horsey , established in Ireland since the 13th century.
German and Swiss German (also Hürst): topographic name from Middle High German hurst ‘woodland, thicket’; or a habitational name from a place so named in Westphalia.

variants.name: Herst
meanings: Jewish (Ashkenazic): artificial name or nickname from Polish herszt ‘ringleader, chieftain’.

variants.name: Horsey
meanings: English (southern): habitational name from Horsey Pignes (Somerset), Horse Eye (Sussex), or Horsey (Norfolk), from Old English hors ‘horse’ + ēg ‘island, low-lying land’.

variants.name: Hearst
meanings: Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of some similar (like-sounding) original Ashkenazic surname such as   Hirsch  .

variants.name: Horst
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Phares, Alois, Armin, Fritz, Hans, Inge, Manfred, Monika, Reinhold.

North German and Dutch: topographic name from Middle Low German hurst, Middle Dutch horst ‘undergrowth, brushwood, wild place’. More specifically, the term was also used to denote a crow's or similar large bird's nest, a raised area in surrounding marshland, or an area of uncleared woodland, all of which meanings could have contributed to the surname. This surname is also a habitational name from any of numerous places called with this word. Compare Hurst .

History: As a name of German origin (see 1 above) the surname Horst is established among the American Mennonites. Their progenitors were the brothers Joseph, Michael, and Peter Horst, who came to PA in 1731 together with their widowed mother. Among their descendants the altered form Hurst is also found.

variants.name: Hirst
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): variant of   Hurst  .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Hurst was born in 1505, in Henlow, Bedfordshire, England, his father, Sir Edward Hurst, was 25 and his mother, Alice Francis Chamberlin, was 20. He married Lady Regent Agnes de Dalton of Henlow Charlemagne descendant. in 1524, in Henlow, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died after 30 May 1569, in his hometown, and was buried in Unknown Island, Western Australia, Australia.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Hurst est né en 1505, à Henlow, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Edward Hurst, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Alice Francis Chamberlin, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Lady Regent Agnes de Dalton of Henlow Charlemagne descendant. en 1524, à Henlow, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé après 30 mai 1569, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Unknown Island, Western Australia, Australie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Hurst 1505 in Henlow, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Edward Hurst 25 und seine Mutter Alice Francis Chamberlin 20. Er hat 1524 in Henlow, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom Lady Regent Agnes de Dalton of Henlow Charlemagne descendant. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 30. Mai 1569 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Unknown Island, Western Australia, Australien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Hurst è nato il nel 1505 nel Henlow, Bedfordshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Edward Hurst, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Alice Francis Chamberlin, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Lady Regent Agnes de Dalton of Henlow Charlemagne descendant. nel 1524, nel Henlow, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 30 maggio 1569, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Unknown Island, Western Australia, Australia.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Hurstが1505年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアヘンロウで生まれた時，父Sir Edward Hurstは25歳，母Alice Francis Chamberlinは20歳であった。1524年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアヘンロウでLady Regent Agnes de Dalton of Henlow Charlemagne descendant.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1569年5月30日以後に故郷で死去し，オーストラリアウエステルン アウストラリアウンクノウン イスランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Hurst(이)가 1505년 영국 베드퍼드실르 헨로에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Edward Hurst(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Francis Chamberlin(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1524년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 헨로에서 Lady Regent Agnes de Dalton of Henlow Charlemagne descendant.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1569년 5월 30일 이후 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 오스트레일리아 웨스터 오스트라리야 노운 이슬랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Hurst nasceu em 1505, em Henlow, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Edward Hurst, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Alice Francis Chamberlin, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Regent Agnes de Dalton of Henlow Charlemagne descendant. em 1524, em Henlow, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu após 30 de maio de 1569, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Unknown Island, Western Australia, Austrália.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Hurst родился в 1505 г. в местности хенлоу, бедфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Edward Hurst было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Francis Chamberlin, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Regent Agnes de Dalton of Henlow Charlemagne descendant. в 1524 г. в местности хенлоу, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер после 30 май 1569 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности унноун исланд, вестирн аустраля, Австралия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Hurst nació en 1505, en Henlow, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Edward Hurst, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Alice Francis Chamberlin, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Lady Regent Agnes de Dalton of Henlow Charlemagne descendant. en 1524, en Henlow, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió después de 30 de mayo de 1569, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Unknown Island, Western Australia, Australia.
